description: Lucas Bruder, co-founder of Jito Labs, discusses Jito Stakenet, a self-sustaining protocol for decentralized liquid staking tokens. He highlights the growth of Jitosoul, which has reached nearly 5 million SOL in total value locked (TVL), equating to around $175 million. The protocol aims to balance decentralization and yield for users while addressing inefficiencies in traditional staking.
topic_summary: Jito Stakenet is introduced as a novel protocol for liquid staking tokens, emphasizing its growth and the challenges of current staking models. The discussion includes insights on MEV extraction and the performance of Jitosoul in the DeFi space, with a focus on its contributions to Solana's ecosystem [t=3:20].
